title: hemerocallis fulva var. disticha
intro: Hemerocallis fulva var. disticha, also known as the Orange Daylily or Tawny Daylily, is a variety of flowering plant in the lily family (Hemerocallidaceae) with distinctive yellow to orange flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its purported medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The extracts of Hemerocallis fulva var. disticha have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in modern supplements, due to its potential medicinal applications.
